subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Rida, inasmuch as thou hast adhered to a craft, for carpentry was among those near unto God and His Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا رضا چه که بصنعت تمسک نمودی و صنعت نجاری از مقربین و مرسلین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @work as worship, @symbolism
